commonPatterns: Use pnpm for all package operations
Include .js extension in import paths (ESM convention)
Use explicit return types on exported functions
Use describe/it blocks with expect assertions
This is a monorepo — respect package boundaries
avoidPatterns: Do not use npm — this project uses pnpm
Use pnpm dlx instead of npx
Do not use any type — strict mode is enabled
Do not import across package boundaries without explicit dependencies
